metadata.description: Fork of addyosmani/agent-skills that layers 10 Batuta skills + 9 agents + 5 hooks (SessionStart + delegation-guard + authoring gates + KB pipeline dispatch) on top. Obsidian-first knowledge base with connected graph.

plugins.name: batuta-agent-skills
plugins.description: Batuta fork of agent-skills. 20 upstream skills + 10 Batuta-specific skills. 9 agents with explicit model: (6 base + agent-architect + 3 KB pipeline). Obsidian KB pipeline with wikilink-connected graph, auto-capture per commit, and research-first vault lookup. Auto KB pipeline per ADR-0012.
